headline: ALL Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Strong Underwriting, Lower Expenses
summary: Allstate's Q1 earnings surge 202% as strong underwriting, higher premiums and lower catastrophe losses drive a major profit beat.

headline: MGIC Q1 Earnings Beat, Revenues Miss Estimates, Premiums Down Y/Y
